name: Diverse Solutions
description_short: Union City, NJ credit repair firm disputing negative items with all three major bureaus. Also offers tax prep, insurance, notary, and translation services.
description_long:
Diverse Solutions Services LLC is a community-focused multi-service financial firm operating out of Union City, NJ, with ties to the New York metro area. According to BBB records, the business has been active since at least 2005, giving it roughly two decades of operational history. The company is not BBB accredited and carries no letter rating from that agency. No CDFI designation, HUD approval, or NFCC certification was found in available public sources, meaning it operates as an independent credit services provider rather than as a federally certified nonprofit counselor.

At its core, Diverse Solutions offers credit repair: working with clients to dispute negative items across all three major credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion — alongside financial coaching to help clients understand and improve their credit profiles over time. But what distinguishes this business from a typical single-service credit shop is its breadth. Google Maps lists the firm under more than nine categories, including auto, health, and dental insurance brokerage; tax preparation; notary public; real estate services; business management consulting; and translation services. Pricing for credit repair is not publicly listed on their website — the firm requires a free consultation before quoting costs.

The company's 5.0/5 Google rating from 630 reviews is its most striking public credential. Achieving a perfect average across that volume of reviews is rare and suggests a genuinely loyal, satisfied client base rather than a handful of cherry-picked testimonials. Their Union City location places them at the heart of one of the most densely populated and diverse communities in New Jersey, and the availability of translation services suggests intentional outreach to non-English-speaking residents navigating credit and financial systems for the first time.

The primary drawbacks are practical: no pricing is disclosed upfront, there is no verified money-back guarantee, and no independent certifications validate their credit repair methodology. The company's name also overlaps with an entirely unrelated real estate technology firm (Diverse Solutions, based in Bellevue, WA), which can create confusion when researching online. Consumers should confirm they are contacting the correct business at 877-394-1117 or via dsconsultantsllc.com. For local Union City-area residents — particularly those who benefit from multilingual support and want a single office for multiple financial needs — this firm merits a consultation.
pros: 5.0/5 Google rating from 630 reviews — an exceptionally high score at significant review volume
Disputes negative items with all three major bureaus: Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion
Free consultation available before committing to any paid service
Active since at least 2005 — approximately 20 years of operation in the community
Translation services available — accessible to non-English-speaking clients navigating credit disputes
One-stop office: credit repair, tax prep, insurance, notary, and real estate services under one roof
Located in Union City, NJ — convenient in-person access for Hudson County residents
cons: Pricing is not publicly listed — costs unknown without scheduling a consultation first
No BBB accreditation and no letter grade issued by the BBB
No verified CDFI, HUD, or NFCC certifications — operates as an independent firm with no federal consumer protection designations
No verified money-back guarantee found in public sources
Company name is shared with an unrelated real estate software firm, making online research confusing — consumers must verify they have the correct entity
best_for: Hudson County, NJ residents who prefer in-person, local credit repair support
Spanish-speaking or multilingual clients who need translation assistance with bureau disputes and financial documents
Consumers who want a single local office for credit repair, tax preparation, insurance, and notary services
Immigrants or first-generation Americans building or repairing U.S. credit history for the first time
diagnosis: Diverse Solutions Services LLC is best suited for Union City-area residents who want hands-on, in-person credit repair support from a long-established local firm — especially those who benefit from multilingual service and bundled financial assistance. The main caveat is that pricing is entirely opaque upfront and no independent certifications verify their dispute methodology, so consumers should enter the free consultation prepared to ask detailed questions about process, timeline, and cost.
services: Credit bureau dispute filing (Equifax, Experian, TransUnion)
Financial coaching and credit score improvement planning
